name: moo.md
description: mind on output — stay present with AI

plugins.name: hope
plugins.description: Thinking discipline for AI work. Clarify intent, shape approach, consult experts, guard unsupervised work.

plugins.name: sound
plugins.description: Code taste as installable rules. Probe a repo's stack, confirm, and scaffold a browsable .claude/sound/ rule map (surfaced by the sound:prime skill) from the taste corpus. Installed rules are user-owned; re-runs reconcile.

plugins.name: hunch
plugins.description: A grab bag of hunches — experimental skills and plugin features tried here before they earn a place in hope or sound. Everything graduates or dies.
